summary_en: Use these working and active Anime Astral Simulator codes to claim free rewards including potions and F2P Tickets.
body_en:
Anime Astral Simulator is an incremental fighting game where you'll need to complete world quests starting from Ninja Village all the way up to Slayer Village. Along the way, you'll repeatedly kill Sabuze, Pane, Kagove, and more enemies to become the strongest fighter.
If you want to start your journey strong, we've rounded up all the active codes in one place and tested them to make sure you can redeem them. The Anime Astral Simulator codes below will reward you with plenty of Damage, XP, Luck, and Power Potions, along with an abundance of F2P Tickets.
To redeem codes, follow these steps:
There are no expired Anime Astral Simulator codes yet. If any of them stop working, we'll move them to this section.
Lauren Harper is an Associate Guides Editor at IGN. She loves a variety of games but is especially fond of puzzles, horrors, and point-and-click adventures. She leads the Roblox coverage as part of her role, so she's always on the lookout for new codes and experiences to test out.
